units.content: Hofman et al. propose a methodology for pre-registration in predictive modelling
Specification §4.14 references Hofman et al. in the context of claim 8a
Hofman et al. does not combine pre-registration with architectural-attribute-driven divergence prediction
Claim 8a is distinguished from Hofman et al. because it combines pre-registration with architectural-attribute-driven divergence prediction, a combination without located antecedent
